category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates a Clang compilation database for Make-based build systems; official README describes generating Clang JSON Compilation Database files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is compiledb; official GitHub repository is nickdiego/compiledb and README documents the compiledb command.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface and contains installation and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; official README describes the project and release metadata matches the package.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Clang and Make-based build systems; official README topics include c, cpp, makefile, clang, compilation-database, and gnu-make.
